{{Quote|Earthquakes! Geysers! Volcanoes and lava! Oh my!|[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]|<ref name="JS" />}}
'''Eol Sha''' was a [[Magma/Legends|volcanic]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Corva sector/Legends|Corva sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], near the [[Cauldron Nebula/Legends|Cauldron Nebula]]. Despite a rather [[Temperature/Legends|temperate]] climate, the majority of the planet's surface was geologically unstable, with [[Geyser/Legends|geysers]] and [[Volcano/Legends|volcanoes]] dotting the surface and destructive natural phenomena, such as avalanches and [[Groundquake/Legends|groundquakes]], occurring regularly.

Settled by gas [[Mining/Legends|miners]] during the time of the [[Galactic Republic]], the planet was orbited by a single [[Moon/Legends|moon]] that was noted for its unstable descending orbit. By the time of the planet's rediscovery in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], it was predicted that Eol Sha's moon would collide with the planet in a matter of years. Under the direction of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the planet's few remaining residents were evacuated and [[Eol Sha Colony|resettled]] on the planet [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] in the year [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]. Later that year, however, the Cauldron Nebula was [[Destruction of the Cauldron Nebula|destroyed]] by the [[Sun Crusher]], an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] piloted by the rogue [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Kyp Durron]], an event that more than likely brought about the destruction of Eol Sha and its [[Eol Sha system/Legends|solar system]].

==History==
In [[89 BBY]], a group of [[Human/Legends|Human]] entrepreneurs made an attempt at establishing a gas [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operation in the [[Cauldron Nebula/Legends|Cauldron Nebula]]. Utilizing [[ramjet mining ship]]s to plow through the [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]], gases could then be collected and processed to create rare elements before being shipped off and sold elsewhere. As the only habitable [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the nebula's vicinity, Eol Sha was colonized by a group of settlers who were intended to participate in the nebula's mining operation. Unfortunately for the planet's new inhabitants, the mining operation was poorly conceived, as its owners severely underestimated the costs associated with the development and maintenance of these proposed harvest [[Starship/Legends|ships]]. This, combined with the escalating costs of processing the mostly unusable gases in the nebula, led to the operation's owners to abandon the project, leaving the colonists on Eol Sha to fend for themselves on the harsh planet.

Over time, the residents of Eol Sha adapted to their new homeworld, hunting the crustacean-like [[bugdillo]]s and harvesting edible lichens for food. At some point in the colony's history, a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] named [[Ta'ania]] settled on the planet as she raised her illicit offspring. [[Gantoris]] was believed to be one of her descendants, as he too possessed an affinity for [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], and in time, he was selected as the leader of his people. After [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of isolation from the larger [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], the mining outpost was rediscovered by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]. Noting the planet's geological instability and the imminent collision between Eol Sha and its [[Moon/Legends|moon]], the representative filed a recommendation for the immediate evacuation of the entire settlement. However, this report went unnoticed by government officials, as the New Republic was in the midst of a [[Thrawn campaign|military campaign]] against [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]].

Two years later, in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] came to the planet in search of Ta'ania's offspring. Upon meeting Gantoris and observing his Force abilities, Skywalker convinced him to join him in his [[New Jedi Order|effort]] to rebuild the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] by promising to relocate the planet's thirty-eight inhabitants to a better home. As a result, the New Republic resettled the people of Eol Sha on the planet [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] shortly after Gantoris' departure with Skywalker. Unfortunately, all of those residing in the [[Eol Sha Colony|new colony]] were slaughtered by [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]] in [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala's]] first strike against the New Republic.
